text.title: wbs-creation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for wbs-creation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Inconsistent decomposition depth across branches — one branch detailed to level 5, another stays at level 2.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Inconsistent depth produces inconsistent work-package sizes; large packages are unestimable and hide dependencies, small packages add tracking overhead without control benefit. Aim for consistent 40-80 hour work packages across the WBS.
